narrative: Surface-water community PWS serving 12,000 customers. E. coli positive on Tuesday sampling. Nitrate 12.4 mg/L (above MCL). Lead 90th-percentile 22 µg/L (action level exceeded). Tier 1 public notification not issued — past 24 hours. Lead service line inventory missing — past Oct 2024 deadline. AWIA RRA overdue (last completed 6 years ago). SCADA HMI default password unchanged. Consumer Confidence Report not published this year. TTHM 95 µg/L (above MCL). Turbidity over 1 NTU on three days last month — TT filtration violation. Monitoring not performed in Q2.
